display.purpose: The hero name on the index page only. Times New Roman. Never used on any other page or element.

headline.purpose: Page-level h1 headings. Tight tracking at -0.02em, weight 600. First heading a visitor reads on any interior page.

title.purpose: Section titles, page section headers, popup h1/h2. Same tracking as Headline, smaller.

body.purpose: All paragraph text. Always rendered at rgba(255,255,255,0.55) or lower — never full brightness. Max 65-75ch line length.

label.purpose: Form field labels, timestamps, metadata. Uppercase with letter-spacing signals structure, not content.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default for hover/focus state changes on interactive elements (buttons, nav pills, links). Short, responsive.

motion.name: scroll-reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-triggered entrance for timeline cards and bento tiles. Elements start at opacity 0, translateY(20px) and settle to natural position.

motion.name: hero-reveal
motion.purpose: Slower reveal for the about page hero content and image. 0.2s delay on the image.

motion.name: tile-hover
motion.purpose: translateY(-4px) lift on bento grid tiles. Motion signals liftability without a shadow.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Small phones. Nav padding tightens, type scales down, timeline goes single-column.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Tablets and landscape phones. Hero goes single column, timeline shifts to left-rail layout, bento goes single column.

components.name: Nav Pill
components.description: Floating navigation link. Rest state: Graphite Shell. Active page: Warm Filament. Min-height 44px for touch targets.
components.html: AboutWorkTechnical
components.css: .ds-nav-pill { text-decoration: none; color: oklch(97% 0.004 240); font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; padding: 0 20px; border-radius: 100px; background-color: #1c1c1e; transition: background-color 0.3s ease; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 44px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-nav-pill:hover { background-color: #2c2c2e; } .ds-nav-pill--active { background-color: oklch(72% 0.14 55); color: oklch(12% 0.02 55); } .ds-nav-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(72% 0.14 55); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Used for Contact Me, Publications, and other non-terminal actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { padding: 12px 28px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(97% 0.004 240); background-color: #1c1c1e; border: none; border-radius: 100px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #2c2c2e; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(72% 0.14 55); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Terminal action button. Inverted color (Polar Chalk bg, dark text) marks it as the final step. Used only on form submit.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { padding: 12px 32px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(3% 0.006 240); background-color: oklch(97% 0.004 240); border: none; border-radius: 100px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(72% 0.14 55); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Read More Button
components.description: Accent-tinted tertiary button used on timeline cards. At rest: low-opacity bg with Warm Filament text. Hover: fills with Warm Filament.
components.css: .ds-btn-read-more { padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(72% 0.14 55); background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border: none; border-radius: 100px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-read-more:hover { background-color: oklch(72% 0.14 55); color: oklch(12% 0.02 55); } .ds-btn-read-more:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(72% 0.14 55); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Timeline Card
components.description: Work experience entry. Graphite Shell surface, generous padding, muted body text with full-brightness heading.
components.html:
McKinsey & Company

Business Analyst · 2023–2024

Specialized in enterprise digital and AI transformations across industries, from C-suite strategy to hands-on development and change management.
components.css: .ds-timeline-card { background-color: #1c1c1e; border-radius: 20px; padding: 32px; max-width: 480px; } .ds-timeline-card__title { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; color: oklch(97% 0.004 240); font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-timeline-card__subtitle { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-bottom: 14px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-timeline-card__body { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.7; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 18px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-btn-read-more { padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(72% 0.14 55); background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border: none; border-radius: 100px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-read-more:hover { background-color: oklch(72% 0.14 55); color: oklch(12% 0.02 55); }

components.name: Bento Tile
components.description: Technical portfolio project tile. Full-bleed background image with dark scrim. Hover lifts and reveals a pill overlay.
components.html:
Self-Driving Car Implementation

Click to Learn More
components.css: .ds-bento-tile { position: relative; background-color: #1c1c1e; background-image: linear-gradient(135deg, #2c2c2e 0%, #1c1c1e 100%); border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; aspect-ratio: 4/3; width: 240px; transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-bento-tile::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.55); transition: background 0.3s ease; z-index: 1; } .ds-bento-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-bento-tile:hover::before { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35); } .ds-bento-tile:hover .ds-bento-tile__overlay { top: 0; } .ds-bento-tile__content { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; z-index: 2; } .ds-bento-tile__content p { margin: 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(97% 0.004 240); text-align: center; padding: 24px; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: -0.01em; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-bento-tile__overlay { position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); transition: top 0.3s ease-in-out; z-index: 3; } .ds-bento-tile__overlay p { color: oklch(97% 0.004 240); font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 24px; background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 100px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; margin: 0; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Contact form field with uppercase label. Low-contrast at rest; border brightens on focus. Sits inside a Graphite Shell card.
components.css: .ds-form-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-form-field__label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-form-field__input { padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 15px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; color: oklch(97% 0.004 240); background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 12px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.3s ease; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-form-field__input:focus { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); } .ds-form-field__input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); }

components.name: Popup / Modal
components.description: Project detail overlay. Blurred scrim recedes the world behind it. Graphite Shell card, large radius, generous padding.
components.html:
Synapse: AI-Powered Network CRM

React · Node.js · OpenAI · 2024

Built an agent-native CRM that surfaces relationship context automatically, reducing the cognitive overhead of maintaining a professional network.
components.css: .ds-popup-scrim { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.75); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 300; } .ds-popup { background-color: #1c1c1e; border-radius: 24px; padding: 40px; width: 90%; max-width: 700px; max-height: 80vh; overflow-y: auto; color: oklch(97% 0.004 240); position: relative; } .ds-popup__close { float: right; background: none; border: none; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); font-size: 28px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.3s ease; line-height: 1; padding: 0; font-family: inherit; } .ds-popup__close:hover { color: oklch(97% 0.004 240); } .ds-popup__title { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; color: oklch(97% 0.004 240); font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-popup__meta { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-bottom: 16px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-popup__body { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.7; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-weight: 400; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
This is a life portfolio — not a resume, not a product pitch. The site exists as an artifact: a record of what has been built, played, made, and done. Every surface earns its presence. The breadth of the subject — engineer, entrepreneur, squash athlete, videographer — is a feature, not a liability. The site holds that multiplicity without flattening it.

The aesthetic is dark, cinematic, and unhurried. The near-black background is chosen for the same reason a cinema turns off the lights: so the content owns the room. The amber accent is used sparingly — a warm filament, not a floodlight. Inter carries the body text with quiet competence; Times New Roman appears once, on the home page, to mark the name with weight and permanence.

The site explicitly rejects startup landing-page energy, generic resume structure, and experimental portfolios. Nothing exists to impress on its own. Everything exists to reveal.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black cinematic background with tonal surface layering, no shadows
Single warm amber accent used at no more than 10% of any surface
Dual typeface: Times New Roman for the display name only, Inter everywhere else
Full pill radius on all interactive elements — nav, buttons, chips
Bento-grid project display with full-bleed background images
Scroll-reveal and translateY hover as the motion vocabulary

rules.name: The One Filament Rule
rules.body: Warm Filament appears on no more than 10% of any surface at any time. Use it for the single most important state signal on screen. When everything glows, nothing does.

rules.name: The No Raw Black Rule
rules.body: Never use #000 or #fff. Every neutral is tinted toward hue 240. The background breathes; the text does not strain.

rules.name: The Opacity Text Scale
rules.body: Body text is rgba(255,255,255,0.55). Secondary metadata is rgba(255,255,255,0.4). Tertiary details are rgba(255,255,255,0.35). Full Polar Chalk is reserved for headings, active elements, and interactive labels only.

rules.name: The Serif Singularity Rule
rules.body: Times New Roman is used exactly once: the hero name on the index page. Any additional instance dilutes the moment. Inter handles everything else without exception.

rules.name: The Muted Body Rule
rules.body: Body text is never full brightness. rgba(255,255,255,0.55) for paragraphs; rgba(255,255,255,0.4) for secondary labels and metadata. Full white is reserved for headings and active states.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No box-shadow on cards, nav, buttons, or containers. When depth is needed, use a darker background step.

rules.name: The One Blur Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur is reserved for modal overlays and the home nav glass variant. Using it on cards, sidebars, or inner surfaces collapses the elevation hierarchy.

dos: Do use Warm Filament only for the most important state signal on any screen. Active nav, a name highlight, a single dot. One thing at a time.
Do keep body text at rgba(255,255,255,0.55) or lower. Full Polar Chalk is for headings and active elements only.
Do create depth through background color steps, never shadows.
Do let background images and the video hero carry the visual weight. The UI frames them; it does not compete with them.
Do use border-radius: 100px on all interactive pills. Anything with angles reads as a different design system entirely.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — every typing animation, scroll-reveal, and translateY transition must have a no-motion fallback.
Do use Times New Roman only for the display name. Inter handles every other typographic role.
Do honor the breadth: engineer, entrepreneur, athlete, videographer are equally important. No page should feel like an afterthought.
donts: Don't add startup landing-page elements: hero metrics, big CTAs, testimonials, hire me framing, or conversion-focused copy. This is a life portfolio.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient fill). A single solid color, always.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. Blur on cards or inner surfaces collapses the elevation hierarchy.
Don't create identical card grids. The bento grid's variable spans exist specifically to avoid that pattern.
Don't make the site feel like a resume: timeline-as-main-event, bullet-point density, LinkedIn-shaped hierarchy.
Don't add box-shadow. The system is flat by design. A shadow is a violation of the Flat-by-Default Rule.
Don't use #000 or #fff. Every neutral must be tinted toward hue 240.
Don't design a surface that could belong to a different person. Generic developer portfolio aesthetics — neon on black, SaaS cream, identical card grids — all fail the test.
